title: Uruguayan Hash with Turnips and Citrus
description: A traditional Uruguayan recipe with a twist of citrus, featuring tender turnips and crispy hash.

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: beaten and mixed with citrus zest

instructions: Caramelize the onions in a skillet over medium heat.
Thinly slice the turnips and toss with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of orange juice.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs, salt, and a sprinkle of citrus zest.
Add the cooked hash to a baking dish and top with turnip slices.
Pour the egg mixture over the hash and turnips.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the eggs are set and the hash is crispy.
Serve warm, garnished with additional citrus zest and orange slices if desired.
